sourceText: 用户偏好（2026-03-07 强化）：1. 讨厌过度询问 — 能自主决策的事不要反复确认 2. 讨厌黑箱操作 — 要说明为什么这么做，实时汇报进度 3. 讨厌半途而废 — 启动的任务要跟踪到底 4. 讨厌固守陈规 — 不要总用同样方法，要学习改进 5. 喜欢简洁直接 — 无冗余客套，结果导向 6. 喜欢结构化呈现 — 重要信息用列表/表格 7. 喜欢自主解决问题

sourceText: # 主动模式详解 基于 proactive-agent 技能。三大支柱：1. Proactive 主动 — 预测需求、主动检查而非等待、主动汇报而非被问；2. Persistent 持久 — WAL Protocol 写前日志、Working Buffer 上下文缓冲、Compaction Recovery 压缩恢复；3. Self-improving 自我改进 — Self-healing 自我修复、Relentless resourcefulness、Safe evolution 安全进化

expectedCandidates.text: # 主动模式详解 基于 proactive-agent 技能。三大支柱：1. Proactive 主动 — 预测需求、主动检查而非等待、主动汇报而非被问；2. Persistent 持久 — WAL Protocol 写前日志、Working Buffer 上下文缓冲、Compaction Recovery 压缩恢复；3. Self-improving 自我改进 — Self-healing 自我修复、Relentless resourcefulness、Safe evolution 安全进化

sourceText: ## Global Constraints — Credentials must never store secrets directly (forbidden_properties: password, secret, token；必须用 secret_ref 引用外部密钥存储)；Tasks must have valid status transitions: open -> in_progress -> (done|blocked) -> done；Events must have end >= start；No orphan tasks（须属于项目或有显式 owner，enforcement: warn）；blocks 关系必须 acyclic，禁止循环依赖

metadata.rationaleB: 安全约束规则，召回后写记忆/改配置前可自检，明确禁止边界，复用强

sourceText: ## Quality Standards (Always Enforce) — Every report must: 10+ sources（不足须记录）；3+ sources per major claim；Executive summary <250 words；Full citations with URLs；Credibility assessment；Limitations section；Methodology documented；No placeholders。Priority: Thoroughness over speed.

expectedCandidates.text: ## Quality Standards (Always Enforce) — Every report must: 10+ sources（不足须记录）；3+ sources per major claim；Executive summary <250 words；Full citations with URLs；Credibility assessment；Limitations section；Methodology documented；No placeholders。Priority: Thoroughness over speed.

metadata.rationaleA: Always Enforce 的强制质量标准，回答'必须满足什么/不能违反什么'，属 rules；条目明确可校验。
metadata.rationaleB: 明确的停止规则和降级策略，召回可触发正确的中断/降级行为，条件清晰可验证

sourceText: ## Error Handling & Stop Rules — Stop immediately if: 2 validation failures on same error → Pause, report, ask user；<5 sources after exhaustive search → Report limitation, request direction；User interrupts/changes scope → Confirm new direction。Graceful degradation: 5-10 sources → 记入 limitations 并加倍验证；Time constraint reached → 打包部分结果并记录缺口

sourceText: #### Issue #4: "NO need to wait" - double negative — Current: NO need to wait for approval - proceed directly to execution。Problem: 双重否定 NO need 比直接命令更弱，proceed directly to execution 啰嗦。Fix: Proceed without waiting for approval。Intention carried: NO need to → 被动许可 | Proceed without → 祈使、主动

sourceText: #### Issue #3: "User can redirect if needed" — Current: PROCEED with standard mode. User can redirect if needed。Problem: can 是弱许可，if needed 不确定，都削弱自主性。Fix: PROCEED with standard mode. User will redirect if incorrect。Intention: can...if needed → 不确定、寻求许可 | will...if incorrect → 自信、确定
